rules.name: Return Window
rules.description: Refund requests must be made within 30 days of the delivery date.

rules.name: Order Status
rules.description: Only delivered orders are eligible for refunds. In-transit or pending orders are not eligible.

rules.name: Refund Abuse Prevention
rules.description: Customers who have made 3 or more refunds in the past 12 months are flagged and automatically denied.

rules.name: Flagged Account
rules.description: Accounts flagged for abuse are automatically denied refunds regardless of other conditions.

rules.name: Non-Refundable Items
rules.description: Digital goods, perishables, and personalized items are non-refundable under any circumstances.

rules.name: Valid Order
rules.description: The order ID must exist in the customer's purchase history.
